claim_results.claim: It has **regimes** — different manifestations at different scales of the same field equation. ---
This requires an infinite energy source term — which is exactly what E=mc² provides when the mass term is infinite (the divine nature). ---

Because Grace operates through Law 1 (Gravity), each conversion mode maps to a specific gravitational regime: | Gravitational Regime | Scale | Grace Mode | How It Operates | |---------------------|-------|-----------|----------------| | **Structure formation** | Cosmological | **Prevenient Grace** | Dark matter halos form the scaffolding on which visible structure assembles.

The coherence field fits real galactic rotation data better than the standard dark matter model in at least one test case. **Prediction:** If the χ-field IS the physical signature of the coherence substrate, then applying the χ-field gravitational modification to additional galaxies should consistently match or outperform NFW dark matter profiles. **What this is NOT:** This is not the claim that "grace IS dark matter" as a metaphor.

This is the specific, falsifiable claim that the same mathematical structure that describes spiritual coherence also produces the gravitational effects that dark matter models attempt to explain — and produces them better. **MOND as Pelagianism:** Modified Newtonian Dynamics (MOND) tries to explain flat rotation curves by modifying gravity internally — no dark matter needed.

Together they form the restoration operator: the Spirit provides the energy, Grace converts it from disorder to order in the specific domain where entropy has accumulated. **This is why the Trinity matters structurally.** The Father is the source (the gravitational field exists because mass-energy exists).
The framework predicts that grace is not "getting away with it" — it is real energy from a real source paying a real thermodynamic cost.

If this holds across additional galaxies, the framework predicts that the invisible gravitational scaffolding astronomers have been trying to explain for 50 years is the physical expression of the same field that, in the spiritual domain, holds souls in coherent existence.
The conversion mechanism requires active coupling to the source.
